leg: A — clone → Word, paragraph family (spec §8.3 step 1, slice 2)
method: Clone driven headlessly (--probe-out + --shot-evalfile, sentinel-gated on window.__WC_READY): 4 paragraphs built via the REAL dispatch path — WC.Commands.run({cmd:'center'}) on p1; WC.PM.cmd('setLineHeight', 2) on p2; WC.Commands.spinner('indentLeft', 0.5) on p3; WC.Commands.spinner('spacingBefore', 12) on p4. Exported via WC.PM.exportDocxBytes -> wordAPI.saveBytes to tests/fixtures/.oracle-out-s2-para.docx (untracked). Word read the export through the oracle's read-para-props AppleScript property set (quirks #13-#20 field-for-field mirror); the open used a 540 s AppleEvent timeout and a split open/read/close sequence because this Word session's open path exceeded the CLI's 2-minute default (see sessionWedge). Close by name-verified ordinal; document count 0 before and after.
exportedXml: word/document.xml pPr per paragraph: p1 <w:jc w:val='center'/>; p2 <w:spacing w:line='480' w:lineRule='auto'/>; p3 <w:ind w:left='720'/>; p4 <w:spacing w:before='240'/> — byte-identical FORMS to what Word 16.77.1 itself wrote for the same features in the Leg B authored file (jc center, spacing line=480 lineRule=auto, spacing before=NNN).

wordRead.generatedBy: read-para-props AppleScript property mirror (split open/read/close, 540s open timeout)

expected.actual: lineSpacingRule 'double' AND lineSpacingPt 24 — both alternatives satisfied

verdict: PASS (4/4) — Word 16.77.1 reads back exactly the paragraph formatting the clone exported; clone twips → Word points conversions all exact (720tw=36pt, 240tw=12pt, 480tw line = double = 24pt on 12pt text).
sessionWedge: This Word session's document-open machinery answered open AppleEvents in ~2-4 minutes (beyond the 2-minute osascript default), so the stock `node scripts/oracle/word-oracle.js read-para-props` invocation died with -1712 before the document materialized. Validation used the identical property reads under `with timeout of 540 seconds` with the oracle's PID-safety contract (count-relative baseline, name verification, close by name-verified ordinal, never quit). Full diagnosis in 2026-06-06-slice2-verdicts.json -> sessionFindings.
pidSafety: document count 0 at baseline, 0 after close; only oracle-tmp-s2-para.docx (a non-dot working copy of .oracle-out-s2-para.docx — dot-prefixed names hang this Word session's file commands) was opened and closed; Word never quit.
